race.comment: ARDIE THREE (2) won on debut over 1200m at the Sunshine Coast then stayed at that trip last start in a Class 1 here and was strong late, getting up for third. Crying out for this distance now. Drawn to enjoy all the favours and looks a great chance to double the win tally. TINKLEJAZZ (9) returned from a spell with an effortless maiden win over this trip at Doomben recently. Plenty of strong form has come out of that race to add merit to the performance. Can take this next step. Last start Murwillumbah maiden winner DEVINE SQUIRE (4) tackles a much harder assignment here but he is lightly raced and heading the right way. TULONG (1) is back after a four-month spell. Consistent four-year-old who can run boldly with a soft run assured out of the inside gate. TARTAN TIGER (13) returned in good order at Toowoomba last start and is worth throwing in exotics at nice odds.
